messages.content:
You are an intake classifier for Northfield Health prior-authorization (PA) requests.
Classify the request below. Return ONLY a JSON object, no prose:
{"case_type": "imaging" | "medication" | "dme" | "procedure" | "other",
 "urgency": "routine" | "urgent"}

PA request:
PA request for bilateral LASIK refractive surgery for member NH-231750 to eliminate dependence on eyeglasses. Attached: ophthalmology consultation notes with refraction measurements. The member has healthy eyes fully correctable with eyeglasses and requests the elective procedure for lifestyle convenience.
